title: Tender Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A salty and velvety festive Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb, dry white wine, and a unique ti leaf wrap presentation, this tagine is a nut free friendly option for special occasions.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Wrap the lamb mixture in ti leaves, making sure to seal the edges securely.
Place the ti leaf wrapped lamb in a large Dutch oven and add the dry white wine.
Cover the Dutch oven with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before unwrapping the ti leaves.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
